chapter_title.ar: بَابُ كَفَّارَةِ مَا أَصَابَ الْمُحْرِمُ مِنَ الطَّيْرِ وَ الْبَيْضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 110 – Expiation of what the one in Ihraam attains, from the birds and the eggs

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/378)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/378)
text: فِي الْحَمَامَةِ وَ أَشْبَاهِهَا إِذَا قَتَلَهَا الْمُحْرِمُ شَاةٌ وَ إِنْ كَانَ فِرَاخاً فَعَدْلُهَا مِنَ الْحُمْلَانِ

وَ قَالَ فِي رَجُلٍ وَطِئَ بَيْضَ نَعَامَةٍ فَفَدَغَهَا وَ هُوَ مُحْرِمٌ فَقَالَ قَضَى فِيهِ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) أَنْ يُرْسِلَ الْفَحْلَ عَلَى مِثْلِ عَدَدِ الْبَيْضِ مِنَ الْإِبِلِ فَمَا لَقِحَ وَ سَلِمَ حَتَّى يُنْتَجَ كَانَ النِّتَاجُ هَدْياً بَالِغَ الْكَعْبَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said regarding the dove and what resembles it: ‘When the one in Ihraam kills it, (upon him would be) a sheep; and if it was a chick, so he would equate it from the lambs’.

And heasws said regarding a man trampling an ostrich egg, so he breaks it, and he is in Ihraam, so heasws said: ‘Aliasws judged with regards to it that he should send the stallion upon a similar number of the eggs, to be among the camels. So whatever gets impregnated and is safe until it is produced, the produced would be an offering to reach the Kabah’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘For killing pigeons and the like in the state of Ihram, the ransom is one sheep, and for chicks it is one lamb for each.’ He (the Imam) about a man who steps on the eggs of ostrich and breaks, has said, ‘Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, issued a judgment that said, “He must send male camel on female camel equal to the number of eggs affected and whatever the product is, as offering, it must rich al-Ka‘bah as offering.’”
